name: FileScopeMCP
description: MCP server for file hierarchy and dependency tracking

scripts.build: esbuild src/config-utils.ts src/file-utils.ts src/file-watcher.ts src/global-state.ts src/grouping-rules.ts src/layout-engine.ts src/logger.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/mermaid-generator.ts src/storage-utils.ts src/types.ts --format=esm --target=es2020 --outdir=dist --platform=node
